title: columnea cruenta
intro: Columnea cruenta, also known as the blood-red Columnea or bloody Columnea, is a flowering plant species in the family Gesneriaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Columnea cruenta include its potential to treat wounds, fever, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to reduce pain and inflammation. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant can be made into a tea or infusion, or used topically as a poultice to apply the medicinal properties directly to the affected area.
